description: Generate an AI scientific schematic / poster figure from a natural-language prompt using OpenRouter (Nano Banana 2 image generation + Gemini iterative quality review).
rules: local-write — produces an image + review log under record_store; mutates no remote/live service
calls OpenRouter over the network; requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and the python3 'requests' library
DOC_TYPE sets the quality threshold (poster 7.0/10, journal 8.5/10, ...); ITERATIONS capped at 2
porter degrades gracefully: absent key / network / requests it writes an empty artifact and exits 0
usage: Set PROMPT (diagram description) and OUTPUT_NAME (image filename, e.g. hero.png). Optional DOC_TYPE (default 'default'), ITERATIONS (default 2). Provide OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: <OUTPUT_NAME> + <stem>_review_log.json under record_store.
limitation: Non-hermetic: needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY + network + the requests library to actually generate an image. Offline it produces an empty placeholder artifact. ITERATIONS is hard-capped at 2 by the core.

vars.PROMPT: POSTER FORMAT for A0. SIMPLE 3-box workflow: DISCOVER then VALIDATE then APPROVE. Giant bold labels. 60% white space.
